mapper.select: SELECT BANNER_ID AS "bannerId", BANNER_NM AS "bannerName", LINK_URL AS "linkUrl", BANNER_IMAGE AS "bannerImage", BANNER_DC AS "bannerDescription", REFLCT_AT AS "reflectAt", FRST_REGISTER_ID AS "createdBy", CASE WHEN FRST_REGIST_PNTTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "createdAt", LAST_UPDUSR_ID AS "updatedBy", CASE WHEN LAST_UPDT_PNTTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "updatedAt", BANNER_IMAGE_FILE AS "bannerImageFile", COALESCE(SORT_ORDR, 9999) AS "sortOrder" FROM COMTNBANNER ORDER BY COALESCE(SORT_ORDR, 9999) ASC, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM DESC, BANNER_ID ASC

SELECT BANNER_ID AS "bannerId", BANNER_NM AS "bannerName", LINK_URL AS "linkUrl", BANNER_IMAGE AS "bannerImage", BANNER_DC AS "bannerDescription", REFLCT_AT AS "reflectAt", FRST_REGISTER_ID AS "createdBy", CASE WHEN FRST_REGIST_PNTTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "createdAt", LAST_UPDUSR_ID AS "updatedBy", CASE WHEN LAST_UPDT_PNTTM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TO_CHAR(LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') END AS "updatedAt", BANNER_IMAGE_FILE AS "bannerImageFile", COALESCE(SORT_ORDR, 9999) AS "sortOrder" FROM COMTNBANNER WHERE BANNER_ID = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMTNBANNER ( BANNER_ID, BANNER_NM, LINK_URL, BANNER_IMAGE, BANNER_DC, REFLCT_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, BANNER_IMAGE_FILE, SORT_ORDR ) VALUES ( #{bannerId}, #{bannerName}, #{linkUrl}, #{bannerImage}, #{bannerDescription}, #{reflectAt}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{updatedBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{bannerImageFile}, #{sortOrder} )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTNBANNER SET BANNER_NM = #{bannerName}, LINK_URL = #{linkUrl}, BANNER_IMAGE = #{bannerImage}, BANNER_DC = #{bannerDescription}, REFLCT_AT = #{reflectAt}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{updatedBy}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME, BANNER_IMAGE_FILE = #{bannerImageFile}, SORT_ORDR = #{sortOrder} WHERE BANNER_ID = #{bannerId}
